title: OUTPATIENT SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT - 211info
text: REDMOND OUTPATIENT TREATMENT OUTPATIENT SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers intensive outpatient treatment for alcohol and drug recovery, including those facing legal issues from their substance addiction, such as DUI. 340 NW 5t Street #202 Redmond, OR 97756 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Phone: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Outpatient treatment: By appointment only (541) 504-2218 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 504-2218 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurance. Sliding scale fee may be available. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable AREA SERVED: Deschutes County Services: Assessment for Substance Use Disorders Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment Other Services Offered At This Location: SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - MEDICATION SUPPORTED RECOVERY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
